publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-10-27 23:24:05 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)
Archival object added, agents added, subjects added

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Videorecorded productions relating to Human Sexuality.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Andrea Hektor, Oct. 2004 Christine Bonilha, August 2011

emph.ref: Series V. Documentaries, Movies, and Television Programming

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Human sexuality-related videorecordings, #7713. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Videorecorded productions relating to human sexuality, including commercial productions, documentaries, feature films, erotica, safe sex tapes, and comedy; products of the Mariposa Education and Research Foundation, the Gay Men's Health Crisis, and the International Foundation for Gender Education; videos from the "Advocate Men Live!" series; a video produced by the American Family Association, titled "Suffer the children: answering the homosexual agenda in public schools"; and a fundraising video produced by the Lesbian Herstory Archives.
Also, some covers, without the videotapes.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Due to the fragility and potential degradation of moving image and sound recordings, viewing and listening is limited to items that have been digitized. If an item is in another media format, you may request to have the item digitized for access. Information on ordering access copies may be found on the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections webpage. Audio visual material that has been digitized: V-653

unittitle.title: A Gay Man's Safe Sex Guide
The Gay Man's Guide to Safer Sex
What Next: A Story of Sex in the 80's
Making the Man: A Young Man's Guide to Safer Sex

did.unittitle: A Time to Talk: Sex and AIDS in the 90's from a Student Perspective
Gay Man's Guide: pour une sexualite sans risque

odd.head: General
odd.p: French version of the Gay Man's Guide to Safer Sex

did.unittitle: AIDS: A Candid Discussion With the Surgeon General

unittitle.title: I Wish You Would: 5 Sizzling Lesbian Fantasies
Exposed: the Making of a Legend
Erotikus... A History of the Gay Movies
International Guide to the Fine Art of Fellatio
LA Plays Itself and Sex Garage
The Private Life of Tim Hamilton
Husbands and Wives, Best Friends and Lovers

did.unittitle: La Cage Aux Folles, with English Subtitles
Buck Angel's Sexing The Transman, volume 1 and 3
Series V. Documentaries, Movies, and Television Programming

Dyke TV: The Best of Winter
Dangerous living: coming out in the developing world 2005

Sacred Boy- Gay Sex Wisdom Volume 4

did.unittitle: Video covers without the videos: Surfer Guys, Pleasure Beach, Shore Leave, Idol Country, and Brian's Men
